zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Swynburne於1237年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德時，他的父親John de Swinburne28歲，母親Avicia de Umfreville22歲。他於1259年與Margaret de Graham在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德勒頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1274年住在英國諾圖波藍德卡亞頓。他去世於1318年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德勒頓享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam de Swynburne于1237年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德时，他的父亲John de Swinburne28岁，母亲Avicia de Umfreville22岁。他于1259年与Margaret de Graham在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德勒頓结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1274年住在英国諾圖波藍德卡亞頓。他去世于1318年在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德勒頓享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Swynburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham): habitational name primarily from Great and Little Swinburne (Northumberland), but perhaps also occasionally from one or other places similarly named, from Old English swīn ‘pig’ + burna ‘stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Swynburne was born in 1237, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Swinburne, was 28 and his mother, Avicia de Umfreville, was 22. He married Margaret de Graham in 1259, in Chollerton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He lived in Capheaton, Northumberland, England in 1274. He died in 1318, in Chollerton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Swynburne est né en 1237, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Swinburne, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Avicia de Umfreville, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Graham en 1259, à Chollerton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il a vécu à Capheaton, Northumberland, Angleterre en 1274. Il est décédé en 1318, à Chollerton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Swynburne 1237 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Swinburne 28 und seine Mutter Avicia de Umfreville 22. Er hat 1259 in Chollerton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Margaret de Graham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1274 hat er in Capheaton, Northumberland, England gelebt. Er starb 1318 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Chollerton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Swynburne è nato il nel 1237 nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Swinburne, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Avicia de Umfreville, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Graham nel 1259, nel Chollerton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Vissuto a Capheaton, Northumberland, England nel 1274. Morì nel 1318, nel Chollerton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Swynburneが1237年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父John de Swinburneは28歳，母Avicia de Umfrevilleは22歳であった。1259年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドチオラートンでMargaret de Grahamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1274年にはイギリスノースウンバーランドカフエアトンに住んでいた。彼は1318年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドチオラートンで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Swynburne(이)가 1237년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Swinburne(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Avicia de Umfreville(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1259년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 컬레르턴에서 Margaret de Graham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1274년도에 영국 노르스벌랜드 캡히턴에서 살았다. 그는 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 컬레르턴에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Swynburne nasceu em 1237, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Swinburne, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Avicia de Umfreville, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Graham em 1259, em Chollerton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele viveu em Capheaton, Northumberland, Inglaterra em 1274. Ele faleceu em 1318, em Chollerton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Swynburne родился в 1237 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Swinburne было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Avicia de Umfreville, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Graham в 1259 г. в местности чоллиртон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он жил в местности кафитон, нортумбирланд, Англия в 1274 году. Он умер в 1318 г. в местности чоллиртон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam de Swynburne nació en 1237, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Swinburne, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Avicia de Umfreville, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret de Graham en 1259, en Chollerton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Vivió en Capheaton, Northumberland, Inglaterra en 1274. Murió en 1318, en Chollerton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años.
